name: QMT MCP — Quantitative Trading MCP
what_it_does: QMT MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with QMT (Quick Momentum Trading) — a popular quantitative trading platform in China — querying A-share stock data, historical prices, real-time market data, and integrating QMT's quantitative trading infrastructure into agent-driven algorithmic trading research and backtesting workflows for Chinese markets.
use_cases: Fetching A-share stock market data from quantitative research agents
Accessing real-time and historical price data from algo trading agents
Querying market indicators for China markets from analytics agents
Building AI-assisted quantitative strategies from trading research agents
Backtesting trading strategies using historical QMT data from quant agents
Monitoring Chinese equity positions from portfolio management agents
not_for: Teams without QMT platform access (requires Chinese securities account)
Non-Chinese market investors (QMT focuses on A-shares)
Automated live trading without human review (significant financial risk)
best_when: A quantitative trader with QMT platform access needs AI-assisted strategy research and market data access for Chinese A-share markets.
avoid_when: You invest in HK/US markets (use Futu MCP) or don't have a Chinese securities account with QMT access.

auth.notes: No external API auth — QMT runs as a local application on Windows. Requires QMT client software and connected Chinese securities brokerage account.

pricing.free_tier_limits: QMT platform: free with brokerage account
pricing.paid_tiers: Advanced QMT features may require brokerage relationship
pricing.notes: QMT is provided by Chinese brokerages (typically Guosen, Xiangcai). Community MCP is free. Requires Chinese brokerage account.

performance.rate_limits: QMT platform rate limits apply; local IPC with QMT client

known_agent_gotchas: QMT client must be running on Windows — not cross-platform
Chinese language documentation — limited English support
Brokerage relationship required — QMT provided by specific Chinese brokerages
Market hours matter — A-share data only available during trading hours for real-time
NEVER automate live trades without explicit human confirmation per CSRC regulations
Community MCP — QMT API changes may break without notice
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local QMT client integration. Financial account access. Chinese regulatory compliance (CSRC) required. NEVER automate trades without human review. Community MCP handling financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial account. Chinese regulatory compliance. Local QMT. Community MCP. No automated trading.
